title: Wizard's Ale
description: A peculiar mod that adds a strange beverage with esoteric effects to Minecraft.
body:
# Wizard's Ale

## Introduction

Welcome to Wizard's Ale, this is a small mod that I thought of while watching someone make Boba tea, Billion Must Drink.

## Features

### Wizard's Ale

- **The Beverage**: Craft this unique beverage using a (somewhat) straightforward recipe.
- **Randomized Effects** Imbibe the Ale and experience a wondrous effect. Will you gain the strength of a bear, the agility of a squirrel, or perhaps find yourself inexplicably invisible?

### Effects
All of these effects are temporary.
- **Lactose Intolerance**: Should the drinker not spontaneously explode upon drinking this beverage they will find themselves unable to digest milk and consequently unable to get rid of potion effect. :)
- **Nausea**: Self explanatory, there is a configurable chance that the drinker only feels nausea upon drinking the Ale.
- **Invisibility**: Hostile Entities and other Players around the drinker will become invisible for a configurable amount of time.
- **Bear Strength**: The consumer will find themselves unable to fit through doors, their armor will pop off of them, they will however gain natural armor, a significant health boost as well as a significant damage increase.
- **Squirrel Rage**: The drinker will find themselves becoming positively small but much more agile and MUCH faster.
- **Slippery Hands**: The imbiber will find themselves unable to hold any items as well as unable to harm any entity.
- **Random Teleportation**: A random teleportation.
- **Midas' Touch**: The Consumer's tools, armor and metals become golden.
- **Sweet Rollification**: The Drinker becomes a pile of Sweet Rolls.
- **Cheese Wheelification**: The Player becomes A wheel of cheese.
- **Animal Transfiguration**: The Imbiber becomes a Random Vanilla Mob.
- **Power Ascension**: Special Effect that has to be brewed.
- **Death**: Death, a sudden (and explosive) one.

### Items and Blocks
The mod adds a few items and blocks, they are:

- **Hop**: an Item that can be planted on Rooted Dirt, the plant grows like Sugar Cane would, it doesn't need water adjacent to it.
- **Witch Eye**: an Item that is rarely dropped by Witches when they are killed by a player, the drop chance is not affected by looting.
- **Cheese Wheel**: a Cheese of wheel that can be placed on the ground, is eaten like a cake, cures effects, is affected by lactose intolerance.
- **Wizard's Ale**: A powerful Brew that grants esoteric effects when consumed, it is made using Wizard's Reagent.
- **Wizard Ale**: A lesser, cheaper, version of the Wizard's Ale, it has a straightforward brewing recipes but includes side effects, it is made using Wizard Reagent.
- **Numerous Potions:** Nearly every Effect in the mod can be distilled into its own potion by brewing a Wizard's Reagent with a specific item.

### Brewing Recipes
- **Wizard Reagent**: This potion that induces nausea is brewed using a Witch Eye and Awkward Potions.
- **Wizard Ale**: This drink is brewed a Hop and Wizard Reagents.
- **Wizard's Reagent**: This potion that induces nausea is brewed using an Enchanted Golden Apple(Notch Apple) and Wizard Reagents.
- **Wizard's Ale**: This drink is brewed a Hop and Wizard's Reagents.

All the following potions need a Wizard's Reagent as a base, the effects not listed in the following can NOT be distilled and must be randomly given upon drinking one of the Ales.

- **Bear Strength**: needs a Blaze Rod.
- **Squirrel rage**: needs a Sugar Cane.
- **Midas' Touch**: needs a Gold Ingot.
- **Random Teleportation**: needs an Ender Pearl.
- **Lactose Intolerance**: needs a Milk Bucket.
- **Slippery Hands**: needs an Ice Block.
- **Enemy Invisibility**: needs a Glass Block.
- **Sweet Rollification**: needs a Sweet Roll.
- **Animal Transfiguration**: needs an Egg.
- **Cheese Wheelification**: needs a Cheese Wheel.

This is the special potion.

- **Power Ascension**: needs to brew a Bear Strength Potion INTO Squirrel Rage Potions.

### Configuration

As of now the server doesn't have configuration files, they will be implemented later.

## Installation

To install The Mod, follow these steps:

1. Download the mod file.
2. Place the file in your `.minecraft/mods/` folder.
3. Launch Minecraft and ensure the mod is loaded correctly.
